'''Sionia''' was home to the Sionian [[Skup/Legends|Skups]], a [[near-human]] species. The planet was noted for the number of master thieves it produced.

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}} {{1stm}}
